verification_result.notes: Validated on 2026-06-11 with cargo-nextest 0.9.129. The requested profile settings are present in .config/nextest.toml, and running cargo nextest run --workspace produces a JUnit XML artifact. On this installed nextest build, the configured path is resolved beneath nextest's profile output directory, so the artifact is written to target/nextest/default/target/nextest/junit.xml rather than repo-root target/nextest/junit.xml. The workspace run is still partial in this sandbox because some existing tests require restricted networking or socket binds, and cargo nextest run --help on this machine does not expose an --export-junit flag.
